history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person stands in the center of the frame, posing in a street-style outfit. They are wearing a dark blue hooded jacket with a camouflage pattern and a shark graphic on the hood. Underneath, a white t-shirt with a cross necklace is visible. The person also wears loose-fitting black cargo pants with a bold white graphic design on the front, a studded belt, and white sneakers with black laces.

The background features a partially constructed building with multiple floors and windows, contrasting with a textured stone wall. To the left, a beige traffic cone with green and red circular symbols and the text "CLEANING IN PROGRESS" is placed on a tiled walkway. To the right, a modern recycling bin with wooden panels and metal accents stands.

The lighting appears to be natural daylight, casting soft shadows and highlighting the textures of the clothing and the background elements. The color palette is dominated by dark blues, blacks, and grays, with accents of white, beige, and the natural stone colors. The overall mood is urban, edgy, and fashionable, capturing a snapshot of contemporary street culture.
